overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban commercial district with towering glass skyscrapers, elevated highways, and palm-lined streets. The player walks along the sidewalk and crosses a busy intersection under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with palm trees and elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right sidewalk of a multi-lane futuristic city street, passing palm trees and digital billboards

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass building with geometric structural patterns and reflective surfaces
multi-level concrete highway overpass with heavy industrial beams
large digital screen displaying colorful advertisements mounted on a metal frame structure
row of palm trees lining the sidewalk along the glass building
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines and vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. To the left rises a massive glass skyscraper with geometric architectural details, while palm trees line the walkway. On the right, an elevated highway structure looms with a large digital billboard displaying neon advertisements. Sparse pedestrians and light vehicle traffic populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: ego steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection via the marked crosswalk, moving with a group of pedestrians toward the opposite side

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
futuristic traffic signal mounted on a tall black pole with glowing indicators
low-rise commercial building at the intersection corner with signage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide urban intersection as the camera approaches and enters the crosswalk. The elevated highway structure now dominates the right side at closer range, while the glass skyscraper recedes into the left background. Pedestrians walk in the same direction across the striped crosswalk, and vehicles wait at the traffic signals. The space opens up significantly compared to the enclosed sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial district with large digital advertising screens

events.description: completing the crosswalk and approaching the opposite sidewalk with closer views of building facades and advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing forward across the intersection and approaching the left side of the street with large advertising displays

entered.detail: massive curved digital advertising screen on the building facade displaying colorful graphics
detailed architectural elements of the commercial building including entryways and signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera completing the street crossing and approaching the opposite side. The glass skyscraper now looms large on the left at close range, revealing detailed architectural features and massive digital advertising screens. The elevated highway structure spans overhead in the distance, and the scene opens into a wider view of the futuristic commercial district with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a futuristic city sidewalk that opens into a wide urban intersection before closing in on the towering architecture of a commercial district. It begins by moving past a massive glass skyscraper and palm trees, while an elevated highway with neon billboards looms to the right. As the camera approaches the street, the enclosed feeling of the sidewalk gives way to a broad, sunlit intersection where the view expands across a striped crosswalk filled with pedestrians and waiting vehicles. The scene then shifts as the camera completes the crossing, causing the highway structure to recede into the distance while the glass skyscraper looms large once more on the left. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal the detailed architectural features and massive digital screens of the surrounding futuristic district.
